articles.title: As the president touts Trump Accounts, some families are still waiting for baby’s $1,000 - AP News
articles.description: President Donald Trump says Trump Accounts could lift children out of poverty and help more Americans invest in the stock market. But some parents are still waiting for the money to arrive. Trump plans to speak at a Georgia high school Wednesday to promote th…
articles.content: WASHINGTON (AP) President Donald Trump says Trump Accounts could hoist children out of poverty and give more Americans the chance to benefit from investments in the stock market. But some parents say… [+5207 chars]

articles.author: Amber Tong, Laura Curtis
articles.title: Trump Sets 100% Tariff on Generic Drugs With Two-Year Delay - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: Generic drug manufacturers will have two years to move production to the US or face a 100% import duty from August 2028, President Donald Trump said, threatening the supply of low-cost medicines that millions of Americans rely on.

articles.title: Coffee lovers can take heart: Up to 5 cups a day appears safe for most adults, experts say - Fox News
articles.description: The American Heart Association says up to 400 milligrams of caffeine daily may lower risk of heart disease, stroke and Type 2 diabetes — with a key caveat.
articles.content:
Coffee drinkers may not have to feel guilty about reaching for another cup.
